pathway_lessons_with_full_pre_post_overl.note: Only ca-rn-nclex-rn:ca-rn-ards includes translated preTest/postTest in this wave. Other lessons use translated section/title/SEO; quizzes fall back to canonical English until wave 1b.

exam_questions.reason: No stable question IDs are committed in-repo; add EXAM_QUESTION overlays after selecting published IDs from production (topic-tagged bank).

flashcards.reason: Deck/card IDs are environment-specific; add FLASHCARD_* overlays when deck inventory is pinned.

gaps: Pre-check/post-check translations for 11 of 12 pathway lessons deferred to wave 1b (same import pipeline; manifests can be extended per lesson).
EXAM_QUESTION and FLASHCARD overlays require stable IDs from the target database.
Canada RPN (ca-rpn-rex-pn) parallel slugs exist in catalog but are not in this wave — extend WAVE1_KEYS in generate-wave1-manifests.mjs.
